channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Alzheimer's tau protein has a surprising secret role in memory
item.description: Researchers found tau is essential for turning new experiences into lasting memories by organizing memory-storing brain cells.

item.title: Scientists finally solved the mystery of Earth's greatest mass extinction
item.description: A new study suggests why beaches today have clam and snail shells instead of brachiopods, linking it to Earth's largest mass extinction.

item.title: Deep-sea life has a secret food source scientists never expected
item.description: Scientists discovered that extreme deep-sea pressure squeezes valuable nutrients out of sinking organic particles, providing an unexpected food source...

item.title: Physicists recreate black hole energy extraction in the lab
item.description: Researchers have recreated the physics of extracting energy from a spinning black hole using a stationary device that produces synthetic ultrafast rot...
